violations.description: HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): A hand drying device (Towels out) was noted not provided at the hand washing lavatory in the food prep area.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Wall behind tubro chefs and floors under and around in place equipment noted in need of cleaning.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): Restroom doors noted not self closing. | TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): A covered waste receptacle was not provided in the north side unisex toilet room
PLUMBING SYSTEM (1 pts): Drain on hand sink not connected and draining on floor.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Microwave interior and ice machine interiors not properly maintained needs cleaning.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted not properly labeled. Pizzas need to have labels on them showing what they are from who and what is in them.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): Restroom doors noted not self closing.
PLUMBING SYSTEM (1 pts): Drain / plumbing noted leaking beneath handsink in kitchen needs repair.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Turbo-chef interior and exterior and other equipment exteriors need cleaning.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Wall behind tubro chefs and floors under and around in place equipment noted in need of cleaning.
